title: AI-generated interface default patterns
sourceLocation: Review of AI-generated marketing pages, dashboards, and product UIs from public code-generation outputs
summary: AI coding agents consistently produce interfaces with centered layouts, purple gradients, pill-shaped elements, generic fonts, weak hierarchy, and templated copy patterns across marketing, product, and dashboard surfaces.
supportingClaims: AI-generated UIs converge on a narrow set of visual defaults regardless of brand or content context.
The pattern set includes centered hero stacks, three-column pricing tables, feature cards with icon-headline-body stacks, and stat-card dashboards.

independence.notes: Original observation of AI-generated interface patterns across publicly shared code generation outputs.
